per_question_results.question: 住民監査請求はどのような手続きで行うのか?
行政不服審査の請求期間はどれくらいか?
正当防衛が成立する要件は何か?
職務質問はどのような場合に行うことができるか?
契約を解除すると、解除前に行った給付はどうなるか?
公序良俗に反する契約はどうなるか?
納税申告に誤りがあった場合、納税者が自ら正すための手続きは?
給与所得の金額はどのように計算するか?

interpretation.summary: Gemini gemini-embedding-001 (multilingual semantic embedding) lifts Recall@10 from 0% (TF-IDF baseline) to 100% across all 8 eval queries, with 6 of 8 questions answered correctly at rank 1.
what_this_demonstrates: The 3,772-article JuriCode-JP corpus contains the right answers — TF-IDF failed because of vocabulary mismatch, not because the data was missing.
A modern multilingual embedding model + 1-条 chunking + cosine retrieval is sufficient to bridge the layperson-vs-statutory phrasing gap on the eval set.
Free-tier Gemini (100 RPM, throttled to ~85 RPM via 0.7s inter-batch sleep) embeds the entire corpus in ~90 seconds at zero cost.
caveats: Eval set is small (N=8). Stable estimates will require expansion to 30+ questions with legal-expert review.
Two questions (住民監査請求 / 行政不服審査の請求期間) landed at rank 2, indicating the top-1 score is sensitive to surface-level overlap with adjacent articles. Future work: re-ranking or hybrid (BM25 + dense).
Embedding cost on free tier limits throughput; production at scale would need paid tier or self-hosted multilingual-e5.

notes: Wall-clock for embed.py with --gemini-sleep-between-batches=0.7: ~90 seconds for 3,772 records, 38 API requests at ~85 RPM. Output: 44.2 MB float32 .npy (3,772 x 3,072).
